title: senecio bolanderi var. harfordii
intro: Senecio bolanderi var. harfordii, also known as harford's ragwort, is a type of plant native to the western coast of North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a purgative and anti-inflammatory agent, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of harford's ragwort include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Harford's ragwort can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for a variety of methods to harness its medicinal properties.
